title: Work Step Event
description: Execution event stream. Each record is one step in the timeline of a work unit (state transition, action taken, gate checked). Layer 53 in the EVA data model architecture.

work_unit_id.description: Foreign key to L52 work_execution_units (CASCADE on delete)

sequence_no.description: Event order within this work unit

timestamp.description: ISO8601 timestamp when this event occurred

actor_type.description: Type of actor that triggered this event

actor_id.description: Identifier of the actor (agent_id, cp_agent_id, persona_id, or 'system')

state_before.description: Status before this event (for state_change events)

state_after.description: Status after this event (for state_change events)

evidence_ids.description: Array of evidence_ids from L31 evidence layer

trace_ids.description: Array of trace_ids from L32 traces layer (LLM call traces)

decision_ids.description: Array of decision_ids from L54 work_decision_records

metadata.description: Freeform event context (phase, step details, metrics, etc.)
